title: Linked valid fixture chain for a portability-hardening change
problem_statement: Positive fixtures need a richer Change Request that exercises optional fields and object linking without adding new protocol structure.
desired_end_state: A linked Change Request fixture demonstrates the frozen v0.1 JSON contract with associated DR, EP, and EV objects.
acceptance_criteria: The linked Change Request validates against change-request.schema.json
The linked fixture set uses only frozen v0.1 fields
The linked Change Request references its related DR, EP, and EV objects by identifier
constraints: Keep the fixture portable as one JSON file per core object
Omit optional fields when they are not needed
